criteria.name: Use-Cases & fachliche Anforderungen
criteria.justification: arc42/01 Use-case catalogue marks exactly 5 Kernfunktionen (UC-01/03/04/06/09), each with Actor + Trigger + Outcome + 'Realises FR'; stakeholder table with concern + key use cases; FR-1..FR-9 unambiguous. Meets vollstaendig: actors + business benefit + stakeholders + widerspruchsfrei.

criteria.name: Qualitaetsanforderungen (NfA) nach SMART
criteria.justification: arc42/10 SMART NFR table: 6 NfA each with Zielwert + Messverfahren + Measured + governing ADR (e.g. NfA-4 'p95 < 200 ms ... measured 15.8 ms', linked to ADR-002/006). ADR linkage visible per row. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Vision der Loesung
criteria.justification: arc42/01 'Problem statement' + 'Vision' (target group/need/scope with explicit Abgrenzung) + 'AI value per core function' giving one KI-Nutzen sentence per Kernfunktion (incl. UC-04 'deliberately zero AI'). Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Loesungsansatz & Architektur (bild+text)
criteria.justification: C4 context + container SVGs consistent with arc42/04 text; Architekturstil (freeze-line two-service split) named and ADR-002-justified; 17 ADRs; roter Faden Problemstellung (fragmentierte Tarifdaten) -> Loesung (freeze line) -> Fazit is genuinely durchgaengig. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Perspektiven (Struktur/Verhalten/Interaktion)
criteria.justification: Struktur (C4 component), Verhalten (sequence/runtime + state diagram), Interaktion (OpenAPI + interface-contract view, C5, PR #25), each with diagram + explanatory text. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Datenmodell
criteria.justification: ER diagram + db/migrations/ scripts + pgvector(1024) HNSW/cosine vector storage documented in arc42 §8/§10. Relational model complete incl. migrations and vector DB. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Code-Struktur (Schichten/Module)
criteria.justification: Clean service boundaries (ingestion/serving/mcp) + console as own app module; READMEs per service; module borders consistent with the §5 component view and the freeze-line entwurf. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Framework-/moderne Konzepte idiomatisch
criteria.justification: arc42/08 names DI (Depends), env-only get_settings(), einheitliche Fehlerbehandlung (HTTPException + declarative 422s), Pydantic validation; framework choice justified via ADR-001 cited in §4/§8; console tests now wired into CI closes the last idiomatic crack. Meets vollstaendig (durchgehend idiomatisch + Framework-Wahl begruendet).

criteria.name: Erkenntnisse aus der Programmierung
criteria.justification: LEARNINGS.md: 14 commit SHAs + 14 PR refs, every entry carries an explicit accepted/corrected/rejected disposition on the AI suggestion (e.g. Codex P1 rejected PR #5 ac8296c; drift-guard accepted PR #12; json.loads corrected PR #2). Concrete + belegt. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Git-Repository verfuegbar
criteria.justification: docs/index.md carries the clickable public repo URL github.com/erhanuenlue/tarifhub; source complete; CI on every push. CONDITIONAL: repo is private until the owner-only Block-3 public flip; if not anonymously reachable at submission this drops to 0/2 (flagged by both the floor note and the Codex second opinion).

criteria.name: Abnahmekriterien
criteria.justification: arc42/10 Acceptance criteria: one Given/When/Then per use case against a concrete observable, each row's final 'Verifies (NfA)' column explicitly cross-references NfA-1..NfA-6; design-scope rows honestly labelled. Meets vollstaendig (testbar + NfA-Bezug).

criteria.name: Teststrategie inkl. KI-Anteile
criteria.justification: arc42/13 has a dedicated 'Tests der KI-Anteile' section with four named real families (guardrail boundary, gap-gate no-call, fill-reuse non-determinism, fail-closed schema); levels named + justified; tools named. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Unit-Tests programmiert
criteria.justification: 295 tests pass offline incl. concrete error cases (validator rejects empty key/inverted window, mapper fail-closed, double-freeze ValueError); run in the CI build. Meets vollstaendig (Kernlogik + Fehlerfaelle + im Build).

criteria.name: Test-Ergebnisse dokumentiert
criteria.justification: arc42/10 'Test and pipeline results' quotes pytest output and coverage TOTALs verbatim AND interprets them ('residual misses are bounded and named, not blind spots'), explicitly noting screenshots only illustrate. This is the 3-pt anchor over the 1-pt screenshot anchor. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: KI-Werkzeuge & Nutzung beschrieben
criteria.justification: AI-tools chapter is phase-structured (Generierung/Review/Refactoring/Recherche) with prompts, diffs and PR+commit refs (e.g. fill-only prompt -> tariff_mapper.py PR #2 057a6c1). CONJUNCTIVE MISS: the Eigenstaendigkeit section is an explicit unsigned placeholder ('not yet his words ... Awaiting the owner's final text and signature', blank Name/Ort/Datum/Unterschrift). The 12-pt anchor requires it 'gemaess Aufgabenstellung vollstaendig', so the tier drops to 7-pt ueberwiegend. Note: a strict grader could read 'not yet his words' as not even 'vorhanden', so 7 is the optimistic read of the lower tier; the owner's signed declaration secures the full 12.

criteria.name: Intelligente/flexible KI-Services
criteria.justification: Two substantial KI roles: fill-only ai_map (structured output, gap-gate, before/after category fills shown) + multilingual-e5 embedding/MCP search; guardrails (AST boundary, fail-closed, label law) documented; human-in-the-loop review queue. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Modulare Sub-Systeme als Container
criteria.justification: docker-compose + per-sub-system Dockerfiles + Helm/k3d; module borders consistent with entwurf; distributed-vs-monolith style choice justified via ADR-002/006 cited in §4/§7; runtime/latency evidence captured into docs/img and §7. Meets vollstaendig.

criteria.name: Fazit: KI-Erfahrungen reflektiert
criteria.justification: fazit.md has three concrete, justified, evidenced veto decisions (freeze line/guard_grozen PR #2 057a6c1; plan+merge gate, 501-vs-404 brief error PR #4 07cdfc5; final acceptance/Eigenstaendigkeit PR #17) + honest limits + a substantive Uebertrag ('match the working mode to the blast radius of an error'). Meets vollstaendig.

gaps_ranked.gap: Eigenstaendigkeitserklaerung is an unsigned placeholder ('not yet his words ... Awaiting the owner's final text and signature'; blank signature fields). The 12-pt tier requires it complete per Aufgabenstellung; until the owner authors and signs the final declaration, this criterion caps at the 7-pt tier, and a strict conjunctive grader could push it lower. Single largest recoverable gap (5 pts) and owner-gated by Fazit veto 3.

Repo URL is in the report but the repository is private until the owner-only Block-3 public flip. If the repo is not anonymously reachable at submission, criterion 10 collapses from 2 to 0. Conditional, not yet realised; corroborated by the Codex second opinion.

No further per-criterion points at risk: all 16 remaining criteria sit at the top anchor on prose, consistency, roter Faden and quoted-and-interpreted evidence. Residual non-scoring risk is compile-time drift when the markdown chapters are flattened into the single submission PDF (em-dashes still present in mkdocs.yml/brand.css per the Codex note; verbatim criterion-8 quote; quoted pytest/coverage figures; embedded diagrams).

top_actions: Replace the Eigenstaendigkeitserklaerung placeholder in docs/method/ai-tools.md with the owner's final self-authored FFHS declaration text and signature before submission. Highest-value action: +5 points (crit 15 from 7 to 12) and it is the one element AI must not author.

Flip the repository to public and confirm the docs/index.md URL (github.com/erhanuenlue/tarifhub) resolves anonymously before hand-in. Protects 2 points (crit 10) that otherwise silently zero out at grading time.

Run the single-PDF compile (FFHS LaTeX template) and re-verify cross-chapter consistency end to end (NfA ids, ADR links, the verbatim criterion-8 quote, quoted pytest/coverage figures, embedded diagrams) and strip the residual em-dashes from mkdocs.yml/brand.css, so the roter Faden and quoted evidence survive the markdown-to-PDF transform where the floor cannot check.
